phase_1.audio: Sound level monitoring shows stabilization from 64.5 dBA to sustained 54.5 dBA. This quiet setting is favorable for sustained focus and deep work.

phase_3.recommendations: Extend session length beyond 92s to build sustained focus momentum. Practice deliberate stillness; reduce repositioning frequency during study periods.
